# Wiro AI SDK — Full Documentation

> Unofficial TypeScript toolkit for Wiro AI. Three packages: @wiroai/sdk (core), @wiroai/cli (terminal), @wiroai/mcp-server (AI assistants). 76 pre-bundled model specs with auto-fetch for unknown models.

## Installation

```bash
# SDK only
npm install @wiroai/sdk

# CLI (global)
npm install -g @wiroai/cli

# MCP Server (via npx, no install needed)
npx -y @wiroai/mcp-server
```

## Authentication

All API calls use HMAC-SHA256 signatures. Get credentials at https://wiro.ai

```bash
export WIRO_API_KEY="your-api-key"
export WIRO_API_SECRET="your-api-secret"
```

## SDK Usage (@wiroai/sdk)

### WiroClient

```typescript
import { WiroClient } from '@wiroai/sdk';

const client = new WiroClient({
  apiKey: process.env.WIRO_API_KEY!,
  apiSecret: process.env.WIRO_API_SECRET!,
});
```

### Run a Model

```typescript
// Submit task and get task token
const run = await client.runModel('google/nano-banana-pro', {
  prompt: 'A cat in space',
  aspectRatio: '16:9',
  resolution: '2K',
});
// run.taskid: string — task ID
// run.socketaccesstoken: string — token for status/wait/websocket

// Wait for completion (polls until done)
const result = await client.waitForTask(run.socketaccesstoken, {
  timeoutSeconds: 120,    // default: 120
  pollIntervalSeconds: 2, // default: 2
});
// result.id: string
// result.status: 'task_postprocess_end' | 'task_cancel'
// result.outputs: OutputFile[]
// result.elapsedSeconds: string
// result.createdAt: string

// Each output file:
// { id, name, contenttype, size, url, accesskey }
for (const output of result.outputs) {
  console.log(`${output.name}: ${output.url}`);
}
```

### Task Management

```typescript
// Check task status
const detail = await client.getTaskDetail({ tasktoken: token });
const detailById = await client.getTaskDetailById(taskId);

// Kill a running task
await client.killTask(taskId);

// Cancel a queued task
await client.cancelTask(taskId);
```

### WebSocket Monitoring

```typescript
const unsubscribe = client.connectTaskWebSocket(token, {
  onQueued: () => console.log('Queued...'),
  onProcessing: () => console.log('Processing...'),
  onCompleted: (outputs) => console.log('Done!', outputs),
  onFailed: (error) => console.error('Failed:', error),
  onError: (error) => console.error('WebSocket error:', error),
});

// Call unsubscribe() to disconnect
```

### Model Registry

```typescript
import { getModelRegistry } from '@wiroai/sdk';

const registry = getModelRegistry();

// Get model definition from bundled specs
const model = registry.get('google/nano-banana-pro');

// Auto-fetch spec if not cached
const model = await registry.ensureSpec(client, 'some/new-model');

// model.slug: string — e.g. "google/nano-banana-pro"
// model.parameters: ModelParameter[] — all parameters
// model.requiredParameters: string[] — required param names
// model.name: string — display name
// model.description: string
// model.processingTime?: string

// Each parameter:
// { name, type, description, required, default?, enum?, format? }

// Validate params before running
const errors = registry.validateParams('google/nano-banana-pro', { prompt: 'test' });
// Returns string[] — empty if valid

// Search models
const results = registry.search('image');

// List all
const all = registry.getAll();

// Download and save spec
const spec = await client.fetchModelSpec('owner/model');
registry.saveSpec('owner/model', spec);
```

### Known Models (KNOWN_MODELS)

```typescript
import { KNOWN_MODELS } from '@wiroai/sdk';
// Array of { slug: string, category: ModelCategory, name: string }
// 76 entries across 15+ categories
```

### Model Slug Format

Accepts both direct slugs and Wiro URLs:

```typescript
import { parseModelSlug } from '@wiroai/sdk';

parseModelSlug('google/nano-banana-pro');                    // → "google/nano-banana-pro"
parseModelSlug('https://wiro.ai/models/google/nano-banana-pro'); // → "google/nano-banana-pro"
parseModelSlug('wiro.ai/models/openai/sora-2?tab=api');      // → "openai/sora-2"
```

### Error Classes

```typescript
import { WiroApiError, WiroAuthError, WiroTimeoutError, WiroValidationError } from '@wiroai/sdk';

// WiroApiError — API returned non-200 (code, message)
// WiroAuthError — missing or invalid credentials
// WiroTimeoutError — task exceeded timeout
// WiroValidationError — invalid input (bad slug format, etc.)
```

### Model Categories

```typescript
import { MODEL_CATEGORIES } from '@wiroai/sdk';
// 'text-to-image' | 'image-to-image' | 'image-editing' | 'text-to-video' |
// 'image-to-video' | 'speech-to-video' | 'talking-head' | 'text-to-speech' |
// 'speech-to-text' | 'text-to-music' | 'text-to-song' | 'voice-clone' |
// 'realtime-conversation' | '3d-generation' | 'text-to-3d' | 'chat' | 'llm' |
// 'reasoning' | 'rag' | 'virtual-try-on' | 'product-ads' | 'template'
```

## CLI Usage (@wiroai/cli)

```bash
wiro run <model> [options]         # Run a model
  --prompt, -p <text>              # Prompt text
  --no-wait                        # Don't wait for completion
  --timeout <seconds>              # Timeout (default: 120)
  key=value                        # Additional parameters

wiro models [options]              # List models
  --category, -c <category>        # Filter by category
  --search, -s <query>             # Search models

wiro info <model>                  # Show model parameters

wiro fetch-spec <model>            # Download OpenAPI spec

wiro status <token>                # Check task status
wiro watch <token>                 # Real-time WebSocket monitoring
wiro kill <taskId>                 # Kill running task
wiro cancel <taskId>               # Cancel queued task
wiro config                        # Configure API credentials
```

## MCP Server (@wiroai/mcp-server)

### Configuration

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "wiro": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@wiroai/mcp-server"],
      "env": {
        "WIRO_API_KEY": "your-api-key",
        "WIRO_API_SECRET": "your-api-secret"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

For HTTP/SSE transport: set `TRANSPORT=http` and optionally `PORT=3000`.

### MCP Tools

#### wiro_run_model
Run any AI model with parameter validation.
```json
{
  "model": "google/nano-banana-pro",
  "params": { "prompt": "A sunset over mountains", "resolution": "2K" },
  "wait": true,
  "timeout_seconds": 120
}
```

#### wiro_model_info
Get detailed parameters for a model. Auto-fetches spec if not cached.
```json
{ "model": "openai/sora-2" }
```

#### wiro_list_models
Browse available models.
```json
{ "category": "text-to-image", "search": "flux" }
```

#### wiro_fetch_spec
Download and cache a model's OpenAPI spec.
```json
{ "model": "klingai/kling-v3" }
```

#### wiro_task_status
Check task status by ID or token.
```json
{ "taskId": "1475069" }
```

#### wiro_task_wait
Wait for task completion with timeout.
```json
{ "taskToken": "abc123", "timeout_seconds": 120 }
```

#### wiro_task_kill / wiro_task_cancel
Kill a running task or cancel a queued task.
```json
{ "taskId": "1475069" }
```

#### wiro_list_categories
List all model categories. No arguments.

## Supported Models (76)

### Text-to-Image
google/nano-banana-pro, google/nano-banana-2, black-forest-labs/flux-2-pro, black-forest-labs/flux-2-flex, black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-4B, black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9B, black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-4B, black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-9B, black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-Krea-dev, ByteDance/seedream-v5-lite, ByteDance/seedream-v5-lite-uncensored, ByteDance/seedream-v4-5, zai-org/GLM-IMAGE, meituan-longcat/LongCat-Image, pruna/wan-image-small, pruna/p-image, reve/Generate, Qwen/Qwen-Image, AIDC-AI/Ovis-Image-7B, xiabs/DreamOmni2, wiro/FLUX.2-dev, wiro/FLUX.2-dev-turbo

### Text-to-Video
openai/sora-2, openai/sora-2-pro, klingai/kling-v3, klingai/kling-v3-omni, klingai/kling-v2.6, klingai/kling-v2.5-turbo, ByteDance/seedance-pro-v1.5, ByteDance/seedance-pro-v1.5-uncensored, ByteDance/seedance-v1-pro-fast, alibaba/wan 2.6, pruna/p-video, PixVerse/text-to-video-v5, wiro/3D Text Animations

### Image-to-Video
lightricks/ ltx-2.3, lightricks/ ltx-2-distilled, klingai/kling-v3-motion-control, Wan-AI/Wan2.2-Animate-Animation, Wan-AI/Wan2.2-Animate-Replace

### Image Editing
FireRedTeam/FireRed-Image-Edit, meituan-longcat/LongCat-Image-Edit, decart-ai/Lucy-Edit-Dev, wiro/camera-angle-editor, wiro/InfiniteYou-flux

### LLM / Chat
google/gemini-3-pro, google/gemini-3-flash, Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B, zai-org/GLM-4.7-Flash, google/translate-gemma-4b-it, google/translate-gemma-12b-it, google/translate-gemma-27b-it, google/translate-gemma-4b-it-image, google/translate-gemma-12b-it-image, google/translate-gemma-27b-it-image, chetwinlow1/ovi, wiro/chat, wiro/rag-chat, wiro/wiroai-turkish-llm-8b, wiro/wiroai-turkish-llm-9b

### Speech & Audio
Qwen/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B, Qwen/Qwen3-ASR-1.7B, microsoft/VibeVoice-Realtime

### 3D & Panorama
microsoft/Trellis-2, tencent/HunyuanWorld-text-to-panorama

### Talking Head
Alibaba-Quark/Live-Avatar

### Commerce & Marketing
wiro/Shopify Template, wiro/Virtual Try-On, wiro/Virtual Try-On-V2, wiro/ugc creator

### HR & Recruitment
wiro/AI-Resume-CV-Parser, wiro/AI-Resume-CV-Evaluator-JobDesc, wiro/AI-Resume-CV-Evaluator-SkillSets, wiro/AI-Resume-CV-Feedback-Generator, wiro/AI-Job-Description-Generator, wiro/AI-Culture-Fit-Test-Generator, wiro/AI-Culture-Fit-Evaluator, wiro/AI-Exit-Interview-Generator, wiro/AI-Exit-Interview-Evaluator, wiro/AI-Leave-Analysis, wiro/AI-Pulse-Survey-Analyzer

### OCR
kristaller486/dots.ocr-1.5

## Architecture

```
@wiroai/sdk          Core: WiroClient, ModelRegistry, auth, types
    |
    +--- @wiroai/cli          Terminal: Commander.js commands
    |
    +--- @wiroai/mcp-server   AI Assistants: 9 MCP tools, stdio + HTTP/SSE
```

All packages are ESM-only, TypeScript, Node.js 18+. The monorepo uses npm workspaces.
